title: Kitsoki demo storyboard
description: The planning contract for a tour-driven demo video. Documentation mirror of the authoritative Go validator (internal/storyboard, `kitsoki storyboard validate`) — keep the two in lockstep. The Go validator additionally enforces semantic lint (reading budgets, total screen time, binding/scenario existence) this schema cannot express.

id.description: Stable kebab-case demo identifier (artifact dirs, filenames).

goal.description: The one-sentence promise the finished video must deliver on.

minTotalMs.description: Overrides the default 25s total screen-time floor for a deliberate short clip (e.g. a deck act).

binding.description: The deterministic no-LLM capture posture. Paths are repo-root-relative.

feature.description: A feature-catalog id (features/<id>.yaml) that already owns the demo binding.

scenario.description: Product-journey catalog linkage (tools/product-journey/scenarios.json) when the demo claims scenario coverage.

purpose.description: The narrative reason the scene exists.

narration.description: Popover body / voiceover text shown during the scene.

screen.description: What is on screen when the scene settles.

dwellMs.description: How long the settled scene holds on screen. Lint: must cover the narration reading budget (~280ms/word, 1200ms floor).

expect.description: Observable claims a reviewer must verify from the captured frames; become the kitsoki-ui-qa scenario steps.

required.description: Whether the QA gate must pass this scene (default true).
